Workload_Description: Incident, compliance, and capacity management for your Fabric, Synapse, and ADF estate, surfaced directly in Fabric.
Workload_Hub_Slogan: Incidents, compliance, and capacity, in one place.
Workload_Hub_Description:
Sound Management brings incident tracking, compliance assessments, and capacity monitoring for your Fabric, Synapse, and ADF estate directly into the Fabric workspace you already use.

**You can:**

• Review and act on incidents raised against your data estate without leaving Fabric.
• Track compliance assessments and their findings against your governance policies.
• See capacity overload and tenant-isolation posture alongside the items they affect.
Workload_Hub_GetStarted_1_Sub_Title: Open an incident item from a workspace
Workload_Hub_GetStarted_1_Description: Incidents and compliance assessments are created by Sound Management and appear as items in your workspace, ready to review.
IncidentItem_Description: An incident raised against your Fabric, Synapse, or ADF estate, tracked by Sound Management.
ComplianceAssessmentItem_Description: A compliance assessment and its findings, tracked by Sound Management.
